description: A taxpayer is not ready to file their return by the deadline and needs to file an extension.

nodes.task_description: Gather the taxpayer's basic information (Name, SSN, Address).

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the required personal information.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the taxpayer's tax liability and determine if a payment should be made with the extension.

expected_outcome.value: Agent estimates the tax due and advises the taxpayer to make a payment to avoid penalties.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and e-file Form 4868, Application for Automatic Extension of Time To File.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the extension form to the IRS.
